headline: Uber Expands Into Hotels With Expedia Deal And Wider Upside Story
summary: Uber Technologies (NYSE:UBER) is adding in-app hotel booking through a new partnership with Expedia. The tie up opens access to more than 700,000 hotels directly inside the Uber app. Features include planned vacation rental integration, curated trip tools, and AI powered booking assistance. Uber Technologies, trading at $74.47, is extending its reach beyond rides and food delivery by folding hotel reservations into its core app. The company’s 3 year return is about 7x, while the 5 year...

headline: Hertz and Uber Partner to Power Autonomous Robotaxi and Driver-Led Fleet Operations
summary: ESTERO, Fla. and SAN FRANCISCO, April 30, 2026--Hertz Global Holdings, Inc.’s (NASDAQ: HTZ) affiliated operating company, Oro Mobility, and Uber Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: UBER) today announced two strategic fleet partnerships, accelerating Hertz’s growth into new mobility vectors and advancing Uber’s autonomous robotaxi and driver-led strategic fleet services.
